title: Oil and Gas Equipment Manufacturer Dubai
content:
Fabtech is a leading oil and gas equipment manufacturer in Dubai. We integrate our decade long experience of working in the market, and our expertise in design and manufacturing to produce reliable, durable, and custom-built oil and gas equipment complimenting the needs of our clients. We have been a part of many prestigious projects in Dubai and across the globe and have received commendations for completing projects in record time. Our enormous and strong experience in the fabrication of equipment, zeal for growth, strong leadership, and teamwork has truly escalated the growth rate of our products’ division. As industry experts, we are well equipped to supply a large volume of our products across oil companies, refineries, petrochemical plants, and marine contractors in Dubai.
Our product line-up includes oil rigs, jack-up legs, offshore derricks, and land rigs available for numerous projects, further keeping us ahead of our competitors. We have earned a reputed image in the market by delivering standard products, which raises the bar of our performance. We aim to satisfy our customer’s need, so every equipment is assembled following the client’s vision. To learn more or avail of our oil and gas equipment, contact our team today!
As a known oil rig manufacturing company in the UAE, we proudly proclaim that Fabtech has refurbished an appreciable number of land rigs ranging from 1000HP to 3000HP and has been actively associated with restoration of many major off-shores jack-up. At present, we have triumphantly constructed derricks for jack-ups and semi-submersible rigs. The largest being a 3000HP rig for Kuwait Drilling Company. The unit included 8 tank mud system, 49 sub-structure, and generator system, all with API 4F certification.
With our admirable and enormous market experience as oil field equipment manufacturer and supplier, we stay a step ahead in competing, for construction of offshore jack-up legs. Fabtech has successfully produced high-quality jack up legs - circular and triangular - and has ensured supply and fabrication of jacking structures on time. Our applaudable precision in manufacturing has helped in changing projects into milestones and earned us a reputed position in the oil and gas market.
It gives immense gratification to state our success in building gobs of bolted single static bottleneck type derrick structure units with maximum static hook load of 970MT. These are built with a special material to handle the harsh environment conditions worldwide and are given finishing touch with its surface coated hot-dip galvanizing. The units are built with multiple trial assemblies to ensure complete customer satisfaction. Fabtech also carries out manufacturing, testing, and delivery of high-pressure piping to 25 offshore derricks.
With a decade long experience as an oil and gas engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) company in Dubai, our manufactured land rigs are up and running across the globe. Our team has triumphantly manufactured land rigs with up to 3000HP capacity. We efficiently carry out land rig equipment, refurbishment, upgrade servicing and rig up\down operations. A variety of equipment and structures are manufactured by Fabtech, including mast, substructure, generator houses, Drill floors, Power trailers, Rig moving systems, Movable workshops and rig mats.
Fabtech group, founded in 1994 and headquartered in the metropolis of Dubai has seen tremendous growth and technology advances for its oil and gas equipment manufacturing division in the past few years. As a premium provider of oil and gas equipment and services, our prime focus has always been to maintain quality in manufacturing oil and gas equipment that actually exceeds international standards. We drive forward with innovation, which can be seen in our industrially upgraded, highly resilient and reliable equipment. We and our competent and experienced workforce solve complex oil and gas sector problems through innovative products, ensuring the long-lasting earned trust of clients. Listed below are a few other benefits of opting for our service.

Rigs with Different Capacities

Triangular Legs While Manufacturing & After Erection

OLEFIN Plant

Substructure of Land Rig

Mast Structure of Land Rig

Drilling Derrick

Mud System & Power Package

Land Drilling Assembly
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
